channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Raised paving and electrical vanle trip hazard, 14th March
item.description:
The tree has uplifted the paving slabs which I have tripped over. There is also an electric cable and box often left on the pavement. This is very dangerous to pedestrians and it's a busy thoroughfare on the square tonthe tube station and theatre. I have tripped up here twice!

Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Pavement Defect (uneven surface / cracked paving slab)

item.title: South if bus stop, 14th March
item.description:
The pit seems to be sinking or collapsing, and the paving stones are uneven and some are unstable
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highgate Road, Dartmouth Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Electric sub station on footpath damaged., 14th March
item.description:
The electric sub station gate has been knocked down. .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Court Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 14th March
item.description:
Evelina Road Remove graffiti from rear wall of 1-6 Honiton Gardens

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Evelina Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No real cleaning and clearing for over a year, 14th March
item.description:
The street cleaning does not happen. As a result the drains and gutters are clogged with rotten leaves. The road is literally getting a bed of topsoil building up in places!!!!! The pavements are a slippery mess. We used to have manual cleaning backed up with a huge vacuum sweeping machine etc. A tiny machine that can't clear anywhere near obstacles came once last year. I feel we are paying for a cleaning contract but the contractor is not doing the work and the council account manager isn't checking their work.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palace View, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 14th March
item.description:
Pot hole

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hurlingham Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street sign badly rusted, 14th March
item.description:
So old and damaged it’s barely readable. Please replace this street sign.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chiddingstone Avenue, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 14th March
item.description:
62 Lausanne Riad Remove graffiti from haukding

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lausanne Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti, 14th March
item.description:
192 Queens Road. Remove graffiti from side wall in Lausanne Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 249, Queen's Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large areas of slippery moss, 14th March
item.description:
Abinger close has a footpath across the back of its green to allow residents access out without walking on the actual road. It is in a terrible state for the whole length. It is NEVER cleared. This needs cleaning and repairing. The end turning area of the Close has lost its top surface YEARS ago & been reported more than once. It is covered in slippery moss permanently. I feel this end of the road has been constantly neglected.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abinger Close, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping, 14th March
item.description:
Opposite 49 Nevill Rd, Stoke Newington. Near traffic filter planter.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barbauld Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10 inch potholes I have to fill in to get to mine, 14th March
item.description:
It’s not a private road my car and all the resistance cars are starting to get damaged. Can you please jump on it as not a big job for a company to sort out with the right machinery

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelsey Lane, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 Christmas trees have been dumped on the pavement across the road from where they were reported before (FixMyStreet ref: 9061615), 14th March
item.description:
The trees are in the way of people walking on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67-68, Enid Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
